channel.title: JUDGE :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Block 7 — INTEGRATION & JUDGMENT — design under uncertainty Year 2, Spring · Weeks 1–8 · 8-week block · 3 credits Working draft for faculty review. Course codes are placeholders. This block is one of eight; it is best read alongside the two-year arc below. Two-year arc: Read (B1) → Modify (B2) → Model (B3) → Structure (B4) → Store (B5) → Build responsibly (B6) → ➤ Judge (B7) → Operate (B8)
